features.name: combinational always block with feedback mux tree
features.description: Code should include a combinational always block containing nested if-else or case statements that assign to signals which indirectly feed back into the same combinational path, creating a potential logic loop when synthesized

features.name: multiple procedural assignments to same signal across always blocks
features.description: Code should include multiple always blocks that assign to or read from shared signals in a way that creates combinational dependency cycles between blocks

features.name: proc_mux case statement with self-referencing conditional
features.description: Code should include a procedural block with case or if-else chains where the output signal conditionally depends on itself through combinational paths, triggering mux tree generation that may form loops
